summary.intent: Address PR review comments on #512 by fixing log formatting and adding thread_id to tracing macros in the chat delivery helpers.
summary.outcome: Fixed chat_for_log to use raw chat_id (not the composite outbound_to() value), added thread_id to all 20 warn!/debug! macro call sites, verified with cargo fmt/clippy/151 passing tests, and pushed the fixes.

repo: ChannelReplyTargetKey in crates/chat/src/lib.rs has thread_id: Option<String> to distinguish forum topics for stream dedup.
outbound_to() returns a composite 'chat_id:thread_id' string used for routing; raw chat_id should still be used for logging identifiers.
There are ~20 tracing macro call sites across delivery helpers in crates/chat/src/lib.rs that follow the pattern 'chat_id = target.chat_id,' inside warn!/debug! macros.

code.finding: replace_all on 'chat_id = target.chat_id,' was sufficient to add thread_id after every tracing macro occurrence; cargo fmt handled indentation normalization afterward.

workflow: Using replace_all for bulk edits across ~20 identical patterns is effective; follow with cargo fmt to normalize indentation.
Standard validation sequence: cargo fmt -> cargo check -> cargo clippy -> cargo test (unit + integration) before committing review fixes.

friction: Indentation after the bulk replace_all edit was uncertain and required cargo fmt to normalize, adding an extra verification step.
